words.name: Bird
words.description:
A warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrate distinguished by feathers, wings, and a beak.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand, forming a "beak" with the index finger and thumb.
2. Tap the finger and thumb together near the mouth once or twice.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant hand, forming a "beak" with the index finger and thumb. 2. Tap the finger and thumb together near the mouth once or twice.

words.name: Chicken
words.description:
A common domestic fowl kept for its eggs or meat.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'G' or 'V' handshape.
2. Start the hand near the mouth.
3. Peck the hand down toward the non-dominant flat palm.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant hand in the 'G' or 'V' handshape. 2. Start the hand near the mouth. 3. Peck the hand down toward the non-dominant flat palm.
